creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to robertostrander from comment #0)

Thanks for reporting, sorry for a late response.

…

building for: FreeBSD my.build.machine 13.0-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p4 amd64
maintained by: gecko@FreeBSD.org

…


If you find errors with a build in a 13.2-RELEASE jail, please write again.
